subtitle: Turn overwhelming tasks into clear, manageable steps.
task_label: Describe what you need to do
task_placeholder: Example: I need to study for an exam but I feel blocked.
task_help: Keep it short, concrete, and honest. The app will break it down into smaller steps.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Showing a structured backup plan.
hero_eyebrow: accessibility-first • bilingual • cognitive support • structured planning
support_text_1: Write one overwhelming task. The app transforms it into smaller, clearer, lower-friction actions designed to reduce cognitive overload.
support_text_2: Cognitive Helper is intentionally quiet, bilingual, and accessibility-led. It uses plain language, step-by-step structure, and a calmer interface to make starting easier.
example_1: I need to study for an exam and I feel blocked.
example_2: I need to clean my room and I do not know where to start.
example_3: I have three things to do and my brain feels overloaded.
history_empty: No plans yet in this session.
